channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: BTS Is Selling Snacks & Energy Drinks at Walmart Now? Everything You Need to Know
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Hey, K-pop fans. Welcome to our podcast. Today, we're talking about the latest venture from BTS, the global K-pop sensation. When they're not busy touring and releasing new music, the members of BTS are exploring the world of snacks and beverages. Let's dive in."
[Short music transition]
Host: "BTS has launched a new food and beverage brand called ARIH, available nationwide at Walmart. The brand aims to bring traditional South Korean flavors to a Western audience. With the help of the BTS members, ARIH offers a range of products, including soup-less noodles, dual-biotic sodas, and postbiotic energy drinks."
[Short music transition]
Host: "The brand's Modern Noodles come in seven flavors and are priced at $8.77 for a four-pack and $3.32 for a single pack. Some of the members' favorite flavors include Gochujang Butter, Vongole, and Truffle Bulgogi. These noodles can be prepared in a microwave or boiled in a pot for convenience."
[Short music transition]
Host: "BTS has also launched postbiotic energy drinks with zero sugar and 100mg of natural caffeine. These drinks are designed to provide steady focus without a caffeine crash and are lightly carbonated for gut health benefits. The members have their favorite flavors, with Suga and J-Hope liking Orange Hour, Jung Kook enjoying Lemon Crest, and Jin favoring Tropical Wave."
[Short music transition]
Host: "Lastly, ARIH's dual-biotic sodas boast prebiotics and postbiotic benefits for gut health. These sodas come in seven flavors, with Suga enjoying Positive Orange and J-Hope liking Red Ruby Galore, a grapefruit flavor. You can buy these products in a pack of four for $8.77."
[Outro music plays]
Host: "That's it for today's podcast. Thanks for tuning in, and don't forget to check out ARIH's products at Walmart. We'll catch you in the next episode."
